underlying_goal: Generate comprehensive, verified executable phase plans for a namespace/co-installation refactoring phase, with critical analysis of edge cases and TDD integration
friction_detail: Claude initially over-replaced the original plan structure with TDD-only plans, then self-corrected to integrate TDD into the existing structure.
brief_summary: User wanted phase plans for a namespace renaming project with critical analysis and TDD; Claude delivered plans, spawned critical/skeptical agents finding real issues, and revised plans with edge case tests.
